meta.name: Enrich new HubSpot contacts with Lusha and alert reps in Slack

parameters.content:
## Auto-Enrich New HubSpot Contacts with Lusha

**Who it's for:** RevOps & Sales teams using HubSpot

**What it does:** The moment a new contact is created in HubSpot, Lusha enriches it with verified phone, job title, seniority, and company firmographics. A data quality check ensures only enriched contacts are updated, and reps get a Slack alert for high-value new contacts.

### How it works
1. HubSpot trigger fires when a new contact is created
2. Checks if the contact has an email address
3. Lusha enriches the contact by email
4. A data quality check validates enrichment results
5. Enriched data is written back to HubSpot
6. High-seniority contacts trigger a Slack alert for reps

### Setup
1. Install the [Lusha community node](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@lusha-org/n8n-nodes-lusha)
2. Add your Lusha API, HubSpot OAuth2, and Slack credentials
3. Customize the seniority filter and Slack channel
4. Activate the workflow — every new HubSpot contact will be enriched in real time

Fires instantly when a new contact is created in HubSpot. A check ensures the contact has an email before calling Lusha.

**Nodes:** HubSpot Trigger → Has Email? (IF)

💡 Replace with a Salesforce trigger if you use Salesforce.

Lusha enriches the contact by email, returning verified phone, title, seniority, and company data. A code node checks if Lusha returned meaningful data before updating CRM.

**Nodes:** Lusha Enrich → Data Quality Check → Was Enriched? (IF)

📖 [Lusha API docs](https://www.lusha.com/docs/)

Enriched data is written back to the HubSpot contact record. Contacts with VP/Director/C-Suite seniority also trigger a Slack alert.

**Nodes:** Update HubSpot → Is High Seniority? → Slack Alert

💡 Customize which seniority levels trigger alerts.
